title: Hanna Kim
text: Hanna Kim is a Ph.D. candidate in Quantitative Methods at the University of Wisconsin-Madison. Her research involves developing and applying statistical models motivated by educational data, such as estimating the effects of longitudinal treatments and extending the use of latent variable modeling to dyadic data analysis.
